data.body: No, my point is a load-sharing setup should be able to modulate any outlet up or down. That's impossible with NEMA outlets, a third-party EVSE can pull 16A and there's nothing you can do to stop it besides breaking the circuit. And 6A would be the slowest, you would typically modulate to much higher
